questions.q: How long is the probation period given to former Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore following his plea agreement on April 14, 2026?
questions.correctText: Sherrone Moore was sentenced to 18 months of probation and fined for two misdemeanor charges related to a confrontation with a former staffer.

questions.q: Which golfer issued a public apology on April 14, 2026, for breaking his driver against a cooler during the final round of the Masters?
questions.correctText: Sergio Garcia received a code-of-conduct warning and later apologized for slamming his driver into the turf and snapping it against a cooler.

questions.q: A new trial resumed in Argentina on April 14, 2026, against seven medical professionals accused of negligence leading to the death of which soccer legend?
questions.correctText: The trial centers on seven medical professionals accused of failing to provide adequate care to Diego Maradona in the weeks leading up to his death.

questions.q: Boston Red Sox outfielder Jarren Duran directed an obscene gesture toward a fan during a 6-0 loss to which team on April 14, 2026?
questions.correctText: Jarren Duran made the gesture toward a fan at Target Field during a loss to the Minnesota Twins, stating the fan made a comment that crossed the line.

questions.q: Alex Ovechkin recorded an assist in what could be the final game of his NHL career during the Capitals' 2-1 season-finale victory against which team?
questions.correctText: Ovechkin assisted on the go-ahead goal in the Washington Capitals' 2-1 victory against the Columbus Blue Jackets on Tuesday night.
